title: The best free AI tools nobody is talking about
post:
Everyone knows ChatGPT and Claude. Here are the free tools that deserve more attention:

1. Perplexity API (free tier): Better search results than Google for research
2. Phind: AI search specifically for developers
3. Monica: AI assistant that works across all browser tabs
4. Bulk Rename Utility with AI: Boring but saves hours
5. Notion AI (free for students): Actually useful for knowledge management
6. Hume AI: Emotionally intelligent AI that reads context better

These aren't as flashy as GPT-5 announcements. But they're genuinely useful in daily workflows.

The best AI tool isn't always the most powerful one. Sometimes it's the one that fits your workflow perfectly.

What hidden gem tools are in your stack?
